signing.note: Shared secret is returned exactly once when the webhook is registered via API or UI. Store it immediately — Pax8 will not re-show it.

transport.retries: Pax8 retries on 5xx/4xx (except 4xx with explicit 'invalid payload' reason) for up to 24h.
transport.ordering: Event timestamps are reliable; use eventId for idempotency keys (monotonically allocated, stable across retries).

notes: Event envelope is consistent across event types; only the 'data' subobject changes shape.
usage_report.ready is the critical monthly event for MSPs doing usage-based billing — fires once per partner.
All samples synthesized from Pax8's documented event envelope + REST API response shapes for the matching resources.
